name: merge-assist-cli
description: AI-powered merge conflict resolver using GitHub Copilot CLI

scripts.test:detect: npm run build && node dist/index.js detect
scripts.test:analyze: npm run build && node dist/index.js analyze
scripts.test:resolve: npm run build && node dist/index.js resolve
scripts.test:status: npm run build && node dist/index.js status

author: Edwin Einsen Vásquez Velásquez
